texto: Tis the human touch in the world that counts-the touch of your hand and mine-Which means far more to the sinking heart than shelter or bread or wine For shelter is gone when the night is o'er and bread lasts only a day But the touch of the hand and the sound of the voice Live on in the soul always.
explicacao: Citação de Spencer M. Free sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Tis the human touch in the world that counts-the touch of your hand and mine-Which means far more…” articula reflexao, amizade, touch em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como boa-noite e reflexao-noturna.
